name: @evvm/cli
description: EVVM CLI - Command-line tool for deploying and managing EVVM instances on testnets
author: EVVM Organization

scripts.copy-files: cp -r lib/evvm/testnet/src/contracts . && cp -r lib/evvm/testnet/src/interfaces . && cp -r lib/evvm/testnet/src/library .
scripts.build-all: bun run build-linux && bun run build-windows && bun run build-macos
scripts.build-linux: bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile .executables/evvm-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile .executables/evvm-linux-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile .executables/evvm-linux-x64-musl && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile .executables/evvm-linux-arm64-musl
scripts.build-macos: bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile .executables/evvm-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile .executables/evvm-darwin-arm64
